sections.paragraph:
an unused root-

(1) prop. as I judge to make an incision, a fissure, rißen (cogn. roots, שָׂרַט, גָּרַד), whence سِرَادُ an awl, Hebr. שֶׂרֶד stylus.

(2) i.q. Arab. سرد to sew together, especially hard things, as leather with wire and an awl, hence to interweave, like a coat of mail; whence سَرْدُ a coat of mail woven of iron threads, see שְׂרָד .

II.
